Related Entities

  • hospital LAREDO MEDICAL CENTER 2-star overall rating
  • hospital DOCTORS HOSPITAL OF LAREDO 3-star overall rating
  • snf Laredo West Nursing and Rehabilitation Center 1-star, 188 beds
  • snf LA FRONTERA NURSING & REHABILITATION 4-star, 186 beds
  • snf LAREDO MEDICAL CENTER 5-star, 18 beds
  • snf LAREDO SOUTH NURSING AND REHABILITATION CENTER 4-star, 112 beds
  • snf LAREDO NURSING AND REHABILITATION CENTER 1-star, 120 beds
  • snf LAS ALTURAS NURSING & TRANSITIONAL CARE 4-star, 138 beds
  • condition Cancer (non-skin) or melanoma among adults Prevalence: 4.1%
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
